parameters.apprise_url_plus: vonage://${ customer_secrets.{{ params.apikey_secret }} }:${ customer_secrets.{{ params.secret_secret }} }@${ customer_secrets.{{ params.from_phone_secret }} }
parameters.description: Send notifications to your own Vonage destination through the UnitySVC gateway. POST the unified message envelope {title, body, type, format}; the gateway composes an Apprise vonage:// URL from your stored secrets and delivers via apprise.unitysvc.dev. The free apprise channel uses your own stored credentials; the apprise-plus channel binds extra per-enrollment destinations via parameters.

apikey_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's Vonage apikey

from_phone_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's Vonage from phone

secret_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's Vonage secret
